title: Inheritance list should not be redundant
description: Inheritance list should not be redundantAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEclumsyWhy is this an issue?An inheritance list entry is redundant if:It isObject- all classes extendObjectimplicitly.It isintfor anenumIt is a base class of another listed inheritance.Such redundant declarations should be removed because they needlessly clutter the code and can be confusing.Noncompliant code examplepublic class MyClass : Object // Noncompliant enum MyEnum : int // NoncompliantCompliant solutionpublic class MyClass enum MyEnumAvailable In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Analyze
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

noncompliant: public class MyClass : Object { } // Noncompliant: Object is redundant
public class MyClass : System.Object { } // Noncompliant: all classes extend Object implicitly
enum MyEnum : int { } // Noncompliant: int is default for enums
compliant: public class MyClass { } // OK: no redundant Object
enum MyEnum { } // OK: no redundant int type
public class MyClass : BaseClass, IInterface { } // OK: explicit base class and interface

logic.detection_conditions: Detects redundant inheritance declarations: class : Object, enum : int
logic.triggering_conditions: (Class explicitly inheriting from Object or System.Object) OR (Enum explicitly specifying int type)
exclusion_conditions: Enums with non-int types (byte, short, long)
logic.reasoning: This rule detects redundant inheritance declarations. Pattern matches 'class X : Object' or 'class X : System.Object' (redundant as all classes implicitly inherit Object) and 'enum X : int' (redundant as int is default for enums). Excludes legitimate base classes and non-default enum types. AST-based approach examines ClassDeclaration.source for redundant inheritance patterns.
